reasoning: Same as L3-01 but in Japanese. lang=ja correctly switches name/description fields to Japanese. Same core problem: 312 general folk festivals returned, zero are 花火大会. Schema works well; lang routing correct. Scores identical to L3-01 adjusted for lang feature working correctly.

reasoning: Query: see northern lights in Japan (Spanish). reasoning: Query: sleep in 100-year-old house in Japan (古民家). Tool: get_hotels prefecture=Gifu returns Gifu hotels.
